accurate.why: All claims match the bill text; correctly identifies both reporting deadlines and content requirements.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all specific provisions trace to the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as requiring FEMA and Comptroller General to review and report on disability disaster assistance.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The bill does not amend existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in this bill.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes 120-day and one-year deadlines, and enactment date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers both the FEMA report and the joint review with their content requirements.

concise.why: Somewhat verbose, with near-complete recitation of sub-requirements rather than a concise summary.

correct_entities.why: FEMA, Comptroller General, and the relevant committees are correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: 120-day and one-year deadlines match the bill; November 25, 2024 enactment date is accurate.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
